prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model. We used GE's (GE Aerospace) current price of $342.72. Historical data (approximately the last year) was analyzed to estimate key parameters: an annualized volatility (sigma) of approximately 28% and an annualized drift (mu) of approximately 50%, reflecting its strong recent performance. For a 20-day forecast, these annual parameters were converted to daily equivalents (daily_sigma ≈ 0.0176, daily_mu ≈ 0.00198). The point estimate is the median of the predicted log-normal price distribution, which accounts for both drift and volatility. The confidence intervals are derived from the same log-normal distribution using corresponding Z-scores for each confidence level.
